creator: greinbold@nosheep.fr
text:
I specify that I build one port after another using

root@poudriere:~ # poudriere bulk -J 1 -j 12-1amd64 -p HEAD -z dsk -f /usr/local/etc/poudriere.d/pkglist-dsk

and

root@poudriere:~ # cat /usr/local/etc/poudriere.conf | grep ALLOW_MAKE_JOBS=
ALLOW_MAKE_JOBS=yes

I will try with 10G RAM, still 3G SWAP and the same process.

Does that sound reasonable?

Regards
